'''tabuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fnord|fnord]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-b-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fnord|fnord]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tabuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæbizhith|tæbizhith]] || [[word:tæbizhij|tæbizhij]] || [[word:tæbizhish|tæbizhish]] || [[word:tæbizhi|tæbizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tabubuzhuth|tabubuzhuth]] || [[word:tabubuzhuj|tabubuzhuj]] || [[word:tabubuzhush|tabubuzhush]] || [[word:tabubuzhu|tabubuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tabuzhuth|tabuzhuth]] || [[word:tabuzhuj|tabuzhuj]] || [[word:tabuzhush|tabuzhush]] || [[word:tabuzhu|tabuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tabufzhuth|tabufzhuth]] || [[word:tabufzhuj|tabufzhuj]] || [[word:tabufzhush|tabufzhush]] || [[word:tabufzhuf|tabufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tabuzhuthu|tabuzhuthu]] || [[word:tabuzhuju|tabuzhuju]] || [[word:tabuzhushu|tabuzhushu]] || [[word:tabuzhuku|tabuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tabuzhuth|tabuzhuth]] || [[word:tabuzhuj|tabuzhuj]] || [[word:tabuzhush|tabuzhush]] || [[word:tabuzhu|tabuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tabuzhuthul|tabuzhuthul]] || [[word:tabuzhujul|tabuzhujul]] || [[word:tabuzhushul|tabuzhushul]] || [[word:tabuzhukul|tabuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tabuzhuthuthu|tabuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:tabuzhujuju|tabuzhujuju]] || [[word:tabuzhushushu|tabuzhushushu]] || [[word:tabuzhuku|tabuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tabuzhuthun|tabuzhuthun]] || [[word:tabuzhujun|tabuzhujun]] || [[word:tabuzhushun|tabuzhushun]] || [[word:tabuzhukun|tabuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tabuzhuthuoro|tabuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:tabuzhujuoro|tabuzhujuoro]] || [[word:tabuzhushuoro|tabuzhushuoro]] || [[word:tabuzhukuoro|tabuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
